withArrow.description: Show tooltip arrow (standard Mantine Tooltip) (Mantine default: `true`)

type.name: SelectComponentType
type.description: Type of select component to use.

itemData.name: Record<string, ISelectComponentItemDataType>
itemData.description: Record containing optional further item data per item name.

settings.name: SelectComponentSettings
settings.description: Optional further settings, like image width etc.

primary.description: Color for active/selected Stargate states (e.g. object selected).

focused.description: Color for interactive states awaiting user action (e.g. no selection yet).

dimmed.description: Color for disabled, inactive, or incompatible Stargate states.

logo.description:
Optional URL to a logo to be displayed while the viewport is hidden.
A default logo will be used if none is provided.
Supply null to display no logo at all.

backgroundColor.description:
Optional background color to show while the viewport is hidden, can include alpha channel.
A default color will be used if none is provided.

busyModeSpinner.description:
Optional URL to a logo to be displayed while the viewport is in busy mode.
A default logo will be used if none is provided.
The positioning of the spinner can be influenced via SPINNER_POSITIONING.

busyModeDisplay.description:
The mode used to indicate that the viewport is busy. (default: BUSY_MODE_DISPLAY.SPINNER)
Whenever the busy mode gets toggled, the events EVENTTYPE_VIEWPORT.BUSY_MODE_ON and EVENTTYPE_VIEWPORT.BUSY_MODE_OFF will be emitted.

spinnerPositioning.description: Where the spinner that is specified by BUSY_MODE_DISPLAY is displayed on the screen. (default: BUSY_MODE_DISPLAY.BOTTOM_RIGHT)

properties.name: fontWeight
properties.description: Font weight for the export title text (Mantine `fw` prop).

properties.name: buttonProps
properties.description: Mantine Button props for the main export action

properties.name: downloadTooltipProps
properties.description: Tooltip wrapping the download button when applicable

properties.name: downloadButtonProps
properties.description: Mantine Button props for the download control

properties.name: buttonLabel
properties.description: When provided, hides the label header and uses this text as the button label.

properties.name: fontWeight
properties.description: Font weight for chunk title (`fw` on label text).

properties.name: colorFormat
properties.description: Color format for ShapeDiver ↔ Mantine conversion.

properties.name: componentSettings
properties.description: Defines settings for select components per parameter name.

properties.name: sliderWidth
properties.description: Width of the slider track (`w` on Mantine `Slider`).

properties.name: numberWidth
properties.description: Width of the numeric input beside the slider (`w` on Mantine `NumberInput`).

properties.name: example
properties.description: Name of example model

properties.name: exampleModels
properties.description: Available example models

properties.name: slug
properties.description: Either slug and platformUrl, or ticket and modelViewUrl must be set.

properties.name: platformUrl
properties.description: Either slug and platformUrl, or ticket and modelViewUrl must be set.

properties.name: acceptRejectMode
properties.description: Set to true to require confirmation of the user to accept or reject changed parameter values.

properties.name: hideAttributeVisualization
properties.description: If the attribute visualization should be hidden by default.

properties.name: hideJsonMenu
properties.description: If the JSON menu should be hidden by default.

properties.name: hideSavedStates
properties.description: If the saved states menu should be hidden by default.

properties.name: hideDesktopClients
properties.description: If the desktop clients should be hidden by default.

properties.name: hideExports
properties.description: If the exports should be hidden by default.

properties.name: loadPlatformSettingsFromViewer
properties.description: In case we cannot connect to the platform, load settings from the viewer, if they were stored there. (default: undefined)

properties.name: modelStateId
properties.description: Optional model state id.

properties.name: refreshJwtToken
properties.description: Optional callback for refreshing the JWT token.

properties.name: instance
properties.description: Optional boolean to treat this sessions as an instance (default: false).

properties.name: loadOnFirstUse
properties.description: If the session is an instance, optional property to delay loading of the instance until the first time it is used. (default: false)

properties.name: keepInStore
properties.description: If the session should be kept in the store after the first use (default: false)

properties.name: id
properties.description: The unique identifier of the session that was specified or automatically chosen on creation of the session.

properties.name: ticket
properties.description: The ticket for direct embedding of the model represented by the session. This identifies the model on the Geometry Backend. If no ticket was provided, a guid has to be provided instead.

properties.name: guid
properties.description: The geometry backend model id (guid). This identifies the model on the Geometry Backend. A jwtToken is needed for authentication. If no guid was provided, a ticket has to be provided instead.

properties.name: modelViewUrl
properties.description: The modelViewUrl of the https://help.shapediver.com/doc/Geometry-Backend.1863942173.html|ShapeDiver Geometry Backend hosting the model.

properties.name: jwtToken
properties.description: The JWT used for authorizing API calls to the Geometry Backend.

properties.name: waitForOutputs
properties.description: Option to wait for the outputs to be loaded, or return immediately after creation of the session. (default: true)

properties.name: allowOutputLoading
properties.description: Option to allow the outputs to be loaded, or to prevent them from being loaded. (default: true)

properties.name: ignoreUnknownParams
properties.description: Option to allow relaxed validation of parameter identifiers. When set to `true`, unrecognized parameters will be ignored rather than causing an error.  (default: false)

properties.name: loadOutputs
properties.description: Option to load the outputs, or not load them until the first call of ISession.customize. (default: true)

properties.name: loadSdtf
properties.description: Option to load the SDTF data. The data is not loaded by default as it can be quite large. (default: false)

properties.name: excludeViewports
properties.description: Option to exclude some viewports from the start. Can be accessed via ISession.excludeViewports.

properties.name: initialParameterValues
properties.description: The initial set of parameter values to use. Map from parameter id to parameter value. The default value will be used for any parameter not specified.

properties.name: modelStateValidationMode
properties.description: The optional model state validation mode to use for the session. If not provided, the default validation mode of the Geometry SDK will be used.

properties.name: throwOnCustomizationError
properties.description: Option to throw an error if parts of a customization failed. (default: false)

properties.name: stargateColorProps
properties.description:
Mantine color tokens for Stargate status UI (`mapStargateComponentStatusDefinition`).
Merged into Stargate-related components via `useProps("StargateShared", …)`.

properties.name: canvas
properties.description: The canvas element in which the viewport should be created, it is encourage to provide one. If none was provided, a canvas will be created.

properties.name: id
properties.description: The unique identifier of the session that was specified or automatically chosen on creation of the viewport.

properties.name: branding
properties.description: The branding options of the viewport.

properties.name: sessionSettingsId
properties.description: The id of the session of which the settings should be used. Only works when sessionSettingsMode is set to SESSION_SETTINGS_MODE.SESSION.

properties.name: sessionSettingsMode
properties.description: The mode in which settings should be applied. (default: SESSION_SETTINGS_MODE.FIRST)

properties.name: visibility
properties.description: The initial visibility of the viewport. (default: VISIBILITY_MODE.SESSION)

properties.name: visibilitySessionIds
properties.description:
The ids of the sessions that should be displayed in the viewport. This only is considered if the visibility is set to VISIBILITY_MODE.SESSIONS.
It's recommended that with this workflow, the sessionSettingsMode is set to SESSION_SETTINGS_MODE.SESSION and a sessionSettingsId is provided.

properties.name: flags
properties.description:
Optional flags that should be initially set on the viewport.
The key is the token that is used to identify the flag, and the value is the type of the flag.

properties.name: initialAutoAdjust
properties.description: If the viewport should automatically adjust the camera to fit the model on creation. (default: false)

properties.name: dark
properties.description: Branding settings for dark scheme

properties.name: light
properties.description: Branding settings for light scheme

properties.name: style
properties.description: Style properties for the container

properties.name: fullscreenId
properties.description: ID of the fullscreen area

properties.name: enableHistoryButtons
properties.description: enable/disable the "parameter history" buttons

properties.name: enableModelStateButtons
properties.description: enable/disable the "model state" buttons

properties.name: enableImportExportButtons
properties.description: enable/disable the "import/export JSON file" buttons

properties.name: enableResetButton
properties.description: enable/disable the "reset parameter values" button

properties.name: enableArBtn
properties.description: enable/disable the "AR" button

properties.name: enableCamerasBtn
properties.description: enable/disable the "cameras" button

properties.name: enableFullscreenBtn
properties.description: enable/disable the "fullscreen" button

properties.name: enableFullscreenBtn3States
properties.description: enable/disable the "fullscreen 3 states (normal | fullscreen with inputs | viewer only fullscreen)" button

properties.name: enableZoomBtn
properties.description: enable/disable the "zoom" button

properties.name: enableHistoryMenuButton
properties.description: enable/disable the "history menu" button

properties.name: color
properties.description: color of the icons

properties.name: colorDisabled
properties.description: color of the icons when disabled

properties.name: variant
properties.description: variant of the icons

properties.name: variantDisabled
properties.description: variant of the icons when disabled

properties.name: iconStyle
properties.description: style of the icons

properties.name: size
properties.description: size of the icons

properties.name: viewportOverlayProps
properties.description: viewport overlay props

properties.name: paperProps
properties.description: paper props

properties.name: dividerProps
properties.description: divider props

properties.name: transitionProps
properties.description: transition props

properties.name: parameterNamesToInclude
properties.description:
Default allow-list of parameter `name` or `displayname` values saved to a model state.
When omitted, all parameters pass the include filter (subject to exclude rules).

properties.name: parameterNamesToExclude
properties.description:
Default deny-list of parameter `name` or `displayname` values omitted from a model state.
When omitted, no parameters are excluded by this filter.

properties.name: parameterNamesToAlwaysExclude
properties.description:
Parameter `name` or `displayname` values always omitted from a model state,
regardless of include/exclude lists.

properties.name: successColor
properties.description: Optional color to use for success notifications.

properties.name: warningColor
properties.description: Optional color to use for warning notifications.

properties.name: errorColor
properties.description: Optional color to use for error notifications.

properties.name: autoClose
properties.description:
Determines whether notification should be closed automatically,
number is auto close timeout in ms.

properties.name: w
properties.description: Group width (Mantine default: `"100%"`)

properties.name: h
properties.description: Group height (Mantine default: `"100%"`)

properties.name: justify
properties.description: Flex justify-content (Mantine default: `"center"`)

properties.name: align
properties.description: Flex align-items

properties.name: gap
properties.description: Gap between children (Mantine spacing)

properties.name: wrap
properties.description: Flex wrap (Mantine default: `"nowrap"`)

properties.name: p
properties.description: Padding — Mantine spacing (Mantine default: `"xs"`)

properties.name: pt
properties.description: Padding top

properties.name: pb
properties.description: Padding bottom

properties.name: mb
properties.description: Margin bottom (Mantine spacing)

properties.name: template
properties.description: Layout template key to render

properties.name: showContainerButtons
properties.description: Show UI buttons for toggling template containers (top/left/right/bottom)

properties.name: p
properties.description: Stack padding

properties.name: headerHeight
properties.description: Height of the header (responsive)

properties.name: navbarBreakpoint
properties.description: Breakpoint below which to hide the navigation bar

properties.name: navbarWidth
properties.description: Width of the navigation bar

properties.name: columns
properties.description: Main area (viewport, bottom, and right container): Number of grid columns

properties.name: rows
properties.description: Main area (viewport, bottom, and right container): Number of grid rows

properties.name: rightColumns
properties.description: Main area (viewport, bottom, and right container): Number of columns for right container

properties.name: bottomRows
properties.description: Main area (viewport, bottom, and right container): Number of rows for bottom container

properties.name: bottomFullWidth
properties.description: Main area (viewport, bottom, and right container): Shall the bottom container use the full width?

properties.name: navbarBorder
properties.description: Should the navbar have a border

properties.name: headerBorder
properties.description: Should the header have a border

properties.name: rightBorder
properties.description: Should the right container area have a border

properties.name: keepBottomInGrid
properties.description:
Should the bottom container be shown at the bottom of the grid even below the navbarBreakpoint?
If false, the bottom container is shown as part of the navigation bar area below the navbarBreakpoint.
In that case, the right container moves to the bottom of the grid layout in portrait mode.

properties.name: containerThemeOverrides
properties.description: Theme overrides per container

properties.name: bgTop
properties.description: Top background color

properties.name: bgLeft
properties.description: Left background color

properties.name: bgRight
properties.description: Right background color

properties.name: bgBottom
properties.description: Bottom background color

properties.name: columns
properties.description: Number of grid columns

properties.name: rows
properties.description: Number of grid rows

properties.name: leftColumns
properties.description: Number of columns for left container

properties.name: rightColumns
properties.description: Number of columns for right container

properties.name: topRows
properties.description: Number of rows for top container

properties.name: bottomRows
properties.description: Number of rows for bottom container

properties.name: topFullWidth
properties.description: Shall the top container use the full width?

properties.name: bottomFullWidth
properties.description: Shall the bottom container use the full width?

properties.name: containerGroupProps
properties.description: Container group props

properties.name: groupProps
properties.description: Group props

properties.name: iconProps
properties.description: Icon props

properties.name: textProps
properties.description: Text props

properties.name: buttonProps
properties.description: Button props (anchor link); `component`/`target`/`rel` are runtime-only, not JSON theme

properties.name: anchorTarget
properties.description: Target for markdown links.

properties.name: size
properties.description: Modal size

properties.name: centered
properties.description: Center modal vertically

properties.name: closeButtonProps
properties.description: Close button props for styling

properties.name: stackGap
properties.description: Gap for the main stack container

properties.name: groupGap
properties.description: Gap for button groups (both additional and action buttons)

properties.name: buttonContainerProps
properties.description: Props for the button container group

properties.name: cancelButtonProps
properties.description: Props for the cancel button

properties.name: confirmButtonProps
properties.description: Props for the confirm button

properties.name: floating
properties.description: Use Mantine `Tooltip.Floating` (follows the pointer) instead of the standard `Tooltip`.

properties.name: withArrow
properties.description: Show tooltip arrow (standard Mantine Tooltip) (Mantine default: `true`)

properties.name: themeOverride
properties.description: Nested Mantine theme applied to tooltip label content.

properties.name: p
properties.description: Padding on all sides (Mantine spacing)

properties.name: accordionPaperProps
properties.description: Props for the Paper component wrapping each accordion.

properties.name: fit
properties.description: Object-fit behavior (see MDN `object-fit`). `scale-down` never upscales past intrinsic size.

properties.name: withBorder
properties.description: When true, applies bordered image styling.

properties.name: isSvg
properties.description: When true, render via `Svg` instead of Mantine `Image`.

properties.name: stackPaperProps
properties.description: Props for the Paper component wrapping the stack.

properties.name: buttonBackProps
properties.description: Props for the back button.

properties.name: iconBackProps
properties.description: Props for the icon on the left of the back button.

properties.name: contentStackProps
properties.description: Props for the content Stack.

properties.name: stackContentProps
properties.description: Props for the content Box.

properties.name: stackProps
properties.description: Props for the Stack component containing buttons.

properties.name: iconForwardProps
properties.description: Props for the icon on the right of the stack buttons.

properties.name: itemTextProps
properties.description: Props for the text of the stack buttons.

properties.name: buttonForwardProps
properties.description: Props for stack buttons.

properties.name: p
properties.description: Padding on all sides (Mantine spacing)

properties.name: defaultGroupName
properties.description:
Name of group to use for parameters and exports which are not assigned to a group.
Leave this empty to not display such parameters and exports inside of an accordion.

properties.name: avoidSingleComponentGroups
properties.description:
Set this to true to avoid groups containing a single parameter or export component.
In case this is not set or true, parameters and exports of groups with a single
component will be displayed without using an accordion.

properties.name: mergeAccordions
properties.description: Merge accordions of subsequent groups into one.

properties.name: pbSlider
properties.description: Bottom padding of Paper component wrapping slider components.

properties.name: identifyGroupsById
properties.description:
Set this to true to identify groups by id instead of name. If so,
multiple groups with the same name will be displayed as separate groups.

properties.name: accordionPaperProps
properties.description: Props for the Paper component wrapping each accordion.

properties.name: elementPaperProps
properties.description: Props for the Paper component wrapping each element inside the accordion.

properties.name: accordionProps
properties.description: Props for the Accordion component.

properties.name: accordionItemProps
properties.description: Props for the c.Item component.

properties.name: accordionControlProps
properties.description: Props for the Accordion.Control component.

properties.name: accordionPanelProps
properties.description: Props for the Accordion.Panel component.

properties.name: wrapperStackProps
properties.description: Props for the Stack component wrapping everything.

properties.name: elementStackProps
properties.description: Props for the Stack component wrapping the elements except the topSection.

properties.name: panelStackProps
properties.description: Props for the Stack component wrapping the elements inside accordion panels.

properties.name: showButtons
properties.description:
Whether to show the buttons or not.
If false, the buttons will never be rendered.
If true, the buttons will always be rendered.
If undefined, the buttons will be rendered if there are changes to accept or reject.
